summary: Migration is broadly on track. The ingestion layer is complete and validated; the reporting cutover slipped a week pending Globex-side data access, which is the main risk to the go-live date.
accomplishments: Completed and validated the ingestion pipeline for all 12 source systems.
Signed off the target warehouse schema with the Globex data team.
Automated nightly reconciliation checks (row counts + null-rate thresholds).
in_progress: Rebuilding the 8 executive dashboards on the new warehouse.
Drafting the cutover runbook and rollback plan.
blockers: Awaiting production read access to Globex CRM (requested 2026-07-02, blocking reporting cutover).
Finance sign-off on the revenue reconciliation logic still outstanding.
upcoming: Complete dashboard rebuild and begin UAT.
Confirm go-live date once CRM access is granted.
notes: Recommend escalating the CRM access request at the Thursday steering committee.
